description: Canonical Slay the Spire 2 knowledge base schema for core/custom layered loading.

notes: RelicGuideEntry supports rarity plus triggerTimingEn/Zh, effectSummaryEn/Zh, and conditionSummaryEn/Zh.
Use triggerTiming to describe the main activation window and conditionSummary to capture notable requirements, symmetry, or drawbacks.
PotionEntry supports targetType, effectFormulaEn, and effectFormulaZh.
Use targetType values that match in-game semantics such as Self, AnyPlayer, or AllEnemies.
PowerEntry supports stackType, stackRuleEn, stackRuleZh, resolutionRuleEn, and resolutionRuleZh.
Use stackType values that match in-game semantics such as Counter or Single.
EnemyEntry supports hpRange, intentPatternEn/Zh, specialMechanicsEn/Zh, and threatSummaryEn/Zh.
Use hpRange to capture ascension-sensitive health ranges compactly when exact values differ by difficulty.
EventEntry supports triggerRestrictionEn/Zh plus a structured options list.
Each option may include localized titles and concise localized result summaries for retrieval and decision support.
EnchantmentEntry supports applicableToEn/Zh, triggerTimingEn/Zh, effectSummaryEn/Zh, and conditionSummaryEn/Zh.
Use applicableTo for card-type or tag restrictions and conditionSummary for one-time, permanent-growth, or out-of-combat limitations.
